sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section II, List of Answers on Topics 13:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section II, List of Answers on Topics 13:1
items.html: The circles are the origin of the vessels of straightness because Malchut of the circles drew the light of the line, and out of her power, the screen was made. (Part Two, Inner Observation, Item 56)
